summary: Frontend-only smoke test of 12 bug fixes for MV Rudraksh. All 12 items verified successfully across Home, Header live search, Product Detail, Shop, and 4 Admin pages (Categories, Blogs, Testimonials, Settings). Admin login (admin@mvrudraksh.com) worked via Sign In button (button lacks type=submit but is reachable by role/name).
passed: Home: Featured Collections section wrapper uses py-8 (reduced gap before Featured Rudraksha heading).
Home: 4 Featured Collection tiles use aspect-[4/3] (verified count=4).
Header live search: modal opens, typing 'mukhi' shows data-testid=live-results with 5 live-prod-<slug> items; clicking first item routes to /product/5-mukhi-rudraksha-nepal.
ProductDetail: layout uses grid-cols-[minmax(0,42%)_1fr] on lg (verified in DOM).
ProductDetail: main product image is aspect-[4/5] (not square).
ProductDetail: UPI QR present with data-testid=upi-qr as from api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code (fallback QR working).
ProductDetail: 'Curated across collections' mixed-cards grid renders below 'You may also love'.
Home 'Voices of Devotees' section: 4 circular avatar images (w-14 h-14 rounded-full object-cover) rendered next to author names + locations.
Shop: filter sidebar has classes lg:sticky lg:top-28 lg:max-h-[calc(100vh-8rem)] lg:overflow-y-auto (sidebar stays put).
Admin /admin/categories: form contains data-testid=cat-image-upload button (URL text input replaced).
Admin /admin/blogs: form contains data-testid=blog-image-upload button (URL text input replaced).
Admin /admin/testimonials: form contains data-testid=testi-avatar-upload button; list view shows 4 circular avatar/fallback elements.
Admin /admin/settings: 'Quick: UPI QR Code Image' card with data-testid=upi-qr-upload button present at top of page.
action_items: Minor (non-blocking): Admin Login 'Sign In' button lacks type="submit" — Enter key would not submit the form; only clicking works. Consider adding type="submit" for a11y/UX. Does not block current release.
